name: What to Do Right After a Heavy Machinery Accident

step.name: Step 1
step.text: If a machine malfunctions, stop everything. First, get medical help immediately even if it feels minor. Next, take photos of the machine and any missing safety guards before they’re fixed. Finally, report it to your supervisor in writing. If the insurance company starts acting "off" or blaming you, that’s your cue to call us at 801-746-0290 for a free chat.

description: What to Do Right After a Heavy Machinery Accident - Boise, West Valley City, West Jordan, Sandy, Murray, Millcreek, South Salt Lake, North Salt Lake, Bountiful, Midvale, Taylorsville, Cottonwood Heights, Holladay, Draper, Riverton, Farmington, Centerville
